title: Chronik to Heimlern outcome bridge
goal: Make operator routing outcomes available to Heimlern through a Chronik-owned append-only envelope while keeping the payload contract in Heimlern and all analysis proposal-only.
completion: Chronik transport/export surfaces and runtime state are audited before implementation claims.
A redacted Chronik envelope binds the Heimlern-owned payload revision and digests without duplicating payload authority.
Heimlern consumes the envelope through a dedicated typed, review-only path and emits a report, valid proposal or insufficient-evidence result.
Grabowski has a separately reviewed, opt-in producer before any real-outcome or live round-trip claim.
Bureau records proposal review state; Leitstand remains an optional read-only projection.

metadata.source_decision: Chronik is the primary historical transport organ; Heimlern is the routing-outcome payload and offline-analysis authority.
metadata.audit_finding: The transport envelope and dedicated typed Heimlern consumer are implemented. Bureau review/display boundaries and a separate opt-in Grabowski producer remain.
